# Titanium Tutoring

> Specialist VCE, SACE, NAPLAN, and medical school admissions tutoring in Adelaide and Melbourne, Australia. Teaching method based on George Pólya's problem-solving framework: Understand, Plan, Execute, Reflect.

## About

Titanium Tutoring is an Australian education provider offering tutoring programs for students in Years 3 through 12, with specialist programs for VCE (Victoria), SACE (South Australia), NAPLAN, selective entry and scholarship exams, and medical school admissions (UCAT and MMI interview preparation).

Contact: contact@titaniumtutoring.com | +61 456 753 747
Locations: Adelaide, South Australia · Melbourne, Victoria · Online Australia-wide
Website: https://www.titaniumtutoring.com.au

## Programs

- Year 3 to Year 12 Weekly Tutoring Classes (all subjects)
- Year 6–8 English Writing Mastery Program
- VCE Tutoring (Victoria) — all study designs and ATAR preparation
- SACE Tutoring (South Australia) — all performance standards
- NAPLAN Preparation (Years 3, 5, 7, 9)
- Selective Entry and Scholarship Exam Coaching (HAST, Suzanne Cory, Melbourne High, private scholarships)
- Australian Mathematics Competition (AMC) and Olympiad Preparation
- Medical School Admissions: UCAT coaching, MMI interview preparation, personal statement guidance

## Teaching Philosophy

George Pólya's four-step method:
1. Understand — diagnose exactly where the student is losing marks
2. Plan — build a personalised strategy targeting specific gaps
3. Execute — structured weekly sessions with worksheets and topic tests
4. Reflect — review every result and adjust the plan

## Results

Students have achieved ATAR scores above 99, gained entry to John Monash Science School, Suzanne Cory High School, and Melbourne High School, received private school scholarships, and gained admission to Bond University Medicine, Monash Medicine, UNSW Medicine, and other medical programs.

Testimonials and outcomes: https://www.titaniumtutoring.com.au/results
